summary: Base W10 (~18 mpw, §4.C) — second post-deload step-up under the permanent Tue-lift / Wed-T / Thu-off template (Adj #92). Mon done clean: hill-stride set 2 (7 × @ 4.5% grade) + honest-easy 40 min @ 10:43, no pain anywhere AM/during/post — Achilles + knees clean on the 2nd hill dose, settling holds (Adj #106). Keep easy days genuinely easy after Fri's 8:59 creep (Adj #96/#105); the tighter Wed→Fri spacing + v4.3 reshape raise the intensity fraction. Owed fresh-day run-MHR max test still rolls forward this week as its own session, not a finisher (Adj #9/#53/#93). Loads queued: rear-delt 130 (Adj #95) Tue; lat 160 (Adj #97), seated calf 345-eligible (Adj #102), Sat DB lat push toward 15 (Adj #99), chest fly bump-eligible (Adj #103) Sat. Holds: incline 145 (Adj #94), preacher 60 reset (Adj #100), chest-supp row 75 reset (Adj #98), pushdown 20 (Adj #101), decline crunch BW.
